label: Intercontinental Exchange (ICE)
note: First hold-book Superorganisation scorecard. Courtenay’s five pillars applied to a company Magis owns — not an external builder like SpaceX.

exceptional_leadership.evidence: Long-tenured exchange/data operator with scaled M&A integration (NYSE, fixed income/data). Public filings show durable franchise leadership.

scale_beyond_individual.evidence: Global clearing, listings, and data networks require institutional scale; goals not achievable by splinter teams.

multi_domain_specialisation.evidence: Exchanges + clearing + mortgage/fixed-income data + technology — multi-domain coordination.

efficient_coordination.evidence: Public evidence of alignment is thinner than founder-led hardware Superorgs; mark partial pending deeper culture/retention work.

tools_network_freeride.evidence: Network effects in listings/clearing/data; counterparties and market participants free-ride into the franchise.

stance_implication: Structural croupier reinforcement supports holding through vol quiet spells when KPI gates pass; coordination pillar needs HUMAN REVIEW before treating ICE as full five-pillar Superorg.
